author: bigtunelover
body:
I just wanted to say thanks for spreading the word on this guy. Wow I have really enjoyed what I listened to and I had never heard of Joe before coming across your site. I will continue to pass the word on as well.

Nice job! I will be checking in frequently.  
Bigtunelover

author: Rachel
body:
Ahh, How Good You Are blows my mind. And Hymn #35 … mmm.

P.S., I like the new the design Burgo :)

author: Burgo
body: Thanks Rachel… glad to see you around, hope all is well :)
